title: Villanova Full-Court Press
objective: Score as many points as possible in a 3-minute Villanova practice rush by catching real basketballs, avoiding decoys, and building combo-based momentum before three misses or hits end the run.

controls.input: Drag left or right anywhere on the lower half of the screen with one thumb
controls.outcome: The rolling Villanova practice hoop tracks your thumb across the court

controls.input: Tap with a second thumb or quick-tap while dragging
controls.outcome: The hoop snaps to the nearest side lane to save a combo or dodge a bad drop
Begins the 3-minute practice session and music cue

steps: Catch falling orange basketballs to score points and raise your combo.
Avoid decoys like foam souvenir balls, referee whistles, and rival red shot-clock blocks that break combo or cost a life.
Every few seconds the coach calls a play: only one marked lane becomes the 'assist lane,' and catches there give double points while catches
outside it only give normal points, forcing constant repositioning.
As speed increases, mixed drops include glowing moneyballs that boost the multiplier if caught in sequence.
The run ends when you lose 3 team-energy hearts from misses or bad catches, or when the 3-minute practice clock expires.
scoring: 1 point per normal basketball, combo increases multiplier up to x5, assist-lane catches add +1 bonus, three moneyballs in a row trigger a 5-second 'Nova Run' where all valid catches are worth double; local offline high-s
tips: Keep your thumb low and centered so short lateral drags cover all lanes.
Use burst lane swap to preserve a high combo when the coach call flips lanes.
Sometimes letting a normal ball go is correct if a decoy cluster is about to land.
Listen for the whistle: the audio cue warns that the assist lane is about to change.
